title: ToppedSlab
description: ToppedSlab: Property for 2D analytical elements, made up of a slab property with concrete topping.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

BaseProperty.description: Base property which is being topped. ISurfaceProperty: Base interface for properties for 2D finite element structural objects such as Panels and FEMeshes.

ToppingThickness.description: Thickness of the topping added on top of the base surface property. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Material.description: Material for the topping of the slab. IMaterialFragment: Base interface for structural materials used by structural properties or as a fragment of the physical material.

PanelType.description: Defines what type of element this property will be used. Used by some analysis packages.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
